root: ^Norman: Geez, you reeled in one of these? I haven't seen a rainbow Trout in, maybe, 3 or 4 years now!
^Sam: Exactly! I'm pumped! Can't believe they're still around!
^Norman: You know, I've heard they don't actually naturally appear around here.
^Norman: Apparently, the wildlife wardens stock the ponds upstream, and they sometimes get down here near the sea.
^Sam: So they're rare because they aren't even supposed to be here?
^Norman: I think so... they look real cool anyways though, so I don't think anyone's complainin' that they pop up every now and then.
^Sam: Maybe I'll have this one taxidermied to preserve it then.
